auditor: Tombe Herrington Chartered Professional Accountants LLP
economic_notes: Band has legal services of $36,389,000 accumulated re: aboriginal title assertion with no payment due unless funds obtained from outside sources. Investments held in Cariboo Indian Enterprises Ltd., Tsilhqot'in Economic Development Corp., Tsilhqot'in Forest Products Inc., Tsilhqot'in Economic Advancement GP Ltd., and Dandzen Development Limited Partnership at nominal cost.
notes: Audit is qualified due to Social Housing tangible capital assets being amortized at CMHC-required rate (equivalent to annual principal reduction of related debt) rather than over estimated useful lives per PSAS. Fiscal year end is March 31, 2023 not 2024. Long-term debt includes both mortgages ($783,823) and capital lease obligations ($452,254) totaling $1,236,077. Subsidiary 1224366 B.C. Ltd. is fully consolidated. Band has outstanding contingent liability of $36,389,000 in legal fees related to aboriginal title assertion. No schedule of remuneration was included in the extracted text. Total government transfers calculated as ISC ($5,490,044) + CMHC ($61,622) + Social Housing revenue from government ($87,427) = $5,639,093.
